steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly accomplished application form together with the complete requirements to the person-in-charge
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive and evaluate the submitted documents

steps.agency_action: 1.2 Prepare master list of applicants for DOLE screening

steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Aide V (LCCAO-Public Employment Service Division)

steps.client_step: 3. Comply with SPES requirements after qualifying the exam and interview

steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Aide V (LCCAO-Public Employment Service Division)

steps.client_step: 4. Attend briefing/ orientation of SPES beneficiaries

steps.person_responsible: OIC-PESO/ Youth Development Officer II (LCCAO-Public Employment Service Division)

steps.client_step: 5. Start working for the SPES partner employers
steps.agency_action: 5.2 Deploy SPES grantees
steps.person_responsible: OIC-PESO/ Youth Development Officer II (LCCAO-Public Employment Service Division)

steps.client_step: 6. Secure certification of working days and submit to PESO
steps.agency_action: 6.2 Generate and submit payroll of SPES grantees to DOLE for payment
steps.person_responsible: Labor and Employment Officer III / City Community Affairs Officer
